It is debatable that whether one should embrace employment or embark on entrepreneurship, particularly for recent graduates. While some people argue that job stability and lower risk make employment an attractive choice, opponents contend that starting a business is more rewarding. Personally, I support the former and I will discuss both of advantages and drawbacks.

On the positive side, employees bear less risk compared to entrepreneurs. For entry-level workers, concerns related to operating funds, human resources, and management are not paramount since they are neither chief executive officer (CEO) nor members of the board of directors. Despite potential unsatisfactory performance, majority of companies ensure that fixed monthly salaries and essential welfares. Moreover, employees are typically safeguarded by employment laws, preventing from vicious bosses and inappropriate demands. If one struggles with the company culture, they can easily explore other career options without significant opportunity costs.

On the contrary, excessive working hours pose a primary drawback, which can have detrimental impacts on individuals’ health and work-life balance. Certain professionals are compelled to exceed the standard 40-hour workweek, surpassing the average working hours. For instance, chefs and waiters are mandated to consistently work beyond 8 hours, especially during continuous holiday periods. Recent research has shown that prolonged periods without adequate relaxation can lead to both mental and physical health issues. This concern is particularly unsettling in occupations such as bus drivers and pilots, where excessive working hours could jeopardize public safety and lead to catastrophic consequences.

In conclusion, choosing between being an employee or an entrepreneur involves weighing various factors, including risk and management of working hours. It is crucial to carefully consider the pros and cons when opting for one’s career path.

entry.title: Forests produce fresh oxygen and participate in regulating climate. But every year the tree cover of our planet decreases due to deforestation.
entry.content:
What are the primary causes of deforestation?
To what results may it lead?

Justify your opinion with relevant examples.

Nowadays the number of trees or plants are continuously decreasing year after year, which has adverse impacts on our living environment. More and more people should be educated to have a common sense about deforestation and its consequences. This essay will delve into the primary reasons behind this issue and subsequently outline its potential effects.

From my own perspective, the foremost cause of deforestation is the expansion of residential areas. It is undeniable that the cost of living in urban areas is constantly rising due to the inflation and the price of raw materials; thus, both manufacturing and the government have no choice but to develop the farmland and greenery. Moreover, wood can be applied to many aspects, including paper, furniture and houses. Some of the trees are valuable, durable and rare resources, some of which made for wooden furniture, such as tables, chairs and doors due to their higher price.

The possible effects of this issue include the loss of biodiversity and exacerbation of global warming. First of all, the destruction of forests and jungles has negative impacts on our planet since some species may lose their habitats, resulting in their extinction. For instance, a study indicated that deforestation in Amazon has severe consequences for the biodiversity, putting various creatures at risk. Secondly, forests play a vital role as the Earth’s lungs since plantations convert carbon dioxide to oxygen, providing the fresh air for all livings. Without them, it will definitely accelerate the rate of global warming, contributing to rising sea levels and extreme weather conditions.

In conclusion, deforestation is resulted from human activities and higher economic value of trees, leading to the loss of biodiversity and climate change. It is imperative that all individuals should cooperate to alleviate the impact of this environmental challenge.

entry.title: The charts below show the number of people in Europe who were affected by four types of noise by day and by night in cities and rural areas in 2007.
entry.content:
The bar charts detail noise levels in Europe in 2007 delineated by time of day and rural or urban location.

Overall, it is evident that traffic was the most dominant factor affecting residents whether in city or rural areas. On the country, industry had the least effects.

Looking at the charts more closely, majority of people in cities were affected by the noise of traffic, with 64 million and 48 million people in day and night, respectively. It is notable that rural scope had similar pattern with city since the number of traffic was accounted the highest figures in the chart, with 58 million in total. Turning to noise from trains, in cities, 10 million individuals were impacted in the day and 8 million at night. In rural areas, this data was only slightly lower (8 million and 6 million).

Both numbers of annoyed people by aircraft and industry were truly low. There was only 4 million people affected by aircraft noise during the day compared to 1 million people at night time. Surprisingly, the noise from industry was the smallest amount in two charts because solely 1.25 million in city experienced the noisy pollution. Furthermore, no one was bothered in rural area regardless of day or night.

entry.title: The chart below shows the number of households in the US by their annual income in 2007, 2011, and 2015.
entry.content:
The bar chart illustrates the annual income distribution of households in the United States across various income levels in the years 2007, 2011, and 2015.

Overall, a consistent pattern is observed among three years. The smallest number of households fell with the $75,000 - $99,999 income range in 2011, whereas the highest number was recorded for incomes exceeding $100,000 in 2015.

Looking at the chart more closely, households earning less than $25,000 numbered around 25 million in 2007, increasing to 29 million in 2011, and then slightly decreasing to 28 million in 2015. It is notable that the income ($75,000 - $99,999) consistently represented the fewest households, with approximately fewer than 15 million in both 2007 and 2011. However, there was notable surge in households earning over $100,000, reaching almost 35 million in 2015, compared to around 28 million in 2011, which had a significantly growth during this period.

The second highest number of households was in the $25,000 - $49,999 income range, with around 30 million in 2011. The group of $50,000 - $74,999 remained almost 20 million during these years, with a slight fluctuation.

entry.title: Some university students want to learn about other subjects in addition to their main subjects. Other believe it is more important to give all their time and attention to studying for a qualification.
entry.content:
Discuss both these views and give your own opinion.

It is undeniable that university offers students numerous and various courses to hone their skills and talents. While some argue that academic institutions should prioritize the primary field of study, opponents advocate for a diverse education. Personally, I support the latter perspective and I will provide both viewpoints in this essay.

Proponents of studying main subject argue that these can increase their academic performance. They posit that students are susceptible to distractions from various coursework and assignments in multiple subjects, ultimately leading to a dilution of their attention on the core curriculum. Consequently, diversifying subjects could have adverse impacts on their learning outcomes, resulting in lower average scores and diminishing the importance of the original subjects.

On the contrary, delving into different areas of expertise can significantly broaden one’s horizons. First of all, general education not only contribute to mental and physical well-being health but open up opportunities in various academic fields. For instance, the rising awareness of health issues has led an increased in psychological or biological courses. Secondly, exposure to multiple subjects can greatly benefit one’s career path. Consider data science, where an exceptional data scientist needs proficiency in both statistics and computer science. Mastery of these diverse subjects undoubtedly enhances employability.

In my opinion, I recommend freshmen or sophomores should explore different courses to discover their interests. This approach fosters their creativity, cultivates varied perspectives, and contributes to a more comprehensive, healthier, and positive educational system.

In conclusion, there are different opinions on focusing one’s subjects, including increasing personal performance and opening one’s horizons. From my own view, I advocate for university students to devote themselves to their main subject while also embracing a range of other subjects.

entry.title: The diagram below show the changes that have taken place at West park Secondary School since its construction in 1950.
entry.content:
The maps compare variation of three different periods at West Park Secondary School during 1950 to 2010.

Overall, it is evident that numerous facilities had been replaced and various buildings were built in this area, including recreation, education and sports.

Looking at the diagram more closely, it is notable that parking lot had the largest area in 2010, comparing to smaller one in 1980 and no car park in 1950, respectively. Academic institute had been expanded in 1980, with a new building for science block, which replaced with the original residential scope.

A quarter of area was planned for playground in 1950 and it remained unchanged in 1980. However, the government relocated the sports field and replaced some part of playground, nearly a third in 2010. As for greenery, although it could be observed in 1950 in the map, authorities had another purpose on this area and removed the farmland in 1980, a sports field was built in 1980. Ultimately, there was an expansion of the car park in 2010 and the sport field was relocated to another place.

entry.title: Plagiarism in academics has become a pressing problem in many countries today.
entry.content:
What are the causes of this problem?
What are some possible solutions?

It is common that the standard graduation of higher education is paper-writing and research. An upward trend of plagiarism in academics has been observed in recent years, which has adverse impacts on educational aspects. In this essay, I will illustrate the underlying reasons for plagiarism and offer some viable solutions on it.

Desire to reach higher scores is one of the most primary reasons for encouraging one to copy texts from others’ dissertations. Those who give exceptional performance on academics might have opportunity for scholarships application to afford one’s tuition fees. One possible approach is that enhancing the difficulties of requirements, including multiple professions co-censoring, peer reviewing and importing plagiarism checking system. Not only does it definitely lessen the frequency of copying, but it improves the importance on heightened academic’s awareness, which will also increase the credibility and reliability on research.

Another major contributing factor in plagiarism is procrastination or poor time management. Students might not realize that the deadline of coursework and put less emphasis on education. Some may focus on their hobbies, and some even have to earn adequate funds to support their studies; however, these might lose the importance of researching and leads to procrastination of doing assignments. This problem can be alleviated by instructing correct time concepts and requiring on several splitting parts of deadline on theses, as this would make students complete it on schedule.

In conclusion, plagiarism is a serious, tricky and difficult problem relating to many aspects, such as the aspiration of excellent grades and procrastination. However, with correct and appropriate measures, it is possible to mitigate the impact of the issue.

entry.title: Some people think that couples should live together before getting married to start knowing each other better and see if they are compatible. Others say that because of this tendency people become immoral and only deep emotional attachment makes a durable alliance.
entry.content:
What is your opinion?

Marriage has always been one of the most enormously important aspects for majority of individuals since it is a life-long commitment for two people. Opinions diverge on whether couples should cohabit before marriage, with some asserting it fosters better understanding between partners, while others contend it may lead to immorality and emotional attachment. I generally agree with the former and I will provide compelling reasons in the essay.

On the one hand, cohabitation allows couples to gain profound insights into each other’s lifestyle. This enables them to familiarize themselves with various aspects of one another, including dietary preferences, sleeping habits and personal hygiene. In Taiwan, numerous reports highlight that many couples struggle with differing living habits, often leading to divorce. By cohabiting for a period, not only does it strengthens their relationships, but it also heightens their awareness of both similarities and differences. Moreover, cohabitation fortifies relationships, rendering them more robust and trustworthy, thereby cultivating enhanced communication and connection.

On the other hand, obsolete concepts should be reconsidered or regenerated. Nowadays, it is possible that a lot of individuals willingly accept new perspectives from foreigner countries or younger generation. Joint life before getting marriage is a popular trend among most people, especially youngsters. In my view, specific traditions or beliefs can detrimentally affect individuals, as they may not develop familiarity with each other without the shared experience of residing in the same apartment or flat.

In conclusion, cohabitation enriches emotional connections, providing valuable insights before marriage or even parenthood. Simultaneously, it is crucial to reevaluate obsolete concepts, as the acceptance of novel ideas from different cultures and generations becomes increasingly prevalent.

entry.title: The maps show improvements that have been made to a university campus between 2010 and present day.
entry.content:
The maps compare the different development in a university campus from 2010 to the present

Overall, it is evident that multiple buildings have changed into diverse facilities. Also, a new road was constructed for educational and residential purposes.

Looking at the maps more closely, in order to recruit more students, two student accommodations were built on the west and east, respectively. A new road was constructed on the east side dormitory, which is convenient for students’ commuting; however, shops and restaurants were demolished because of this new dormitory and pathway. Meanwhile, a student accommodation on south-west was replaced by student facilities, including shops and offices.

Teaching block was expanded for the department of arts and science; thus, each subject was built independently to replace university offices and mixed subjects teaching block. Furthermore, the lawn and seating area were removed and the lake was remained. Therefore, new campus’s greenery or plants are less than ever before.

entry.title: The government should sometimes infringe on people's freedom for the security of society.
entry.content:
To what extent do you agree or disagree with this statement?

Nowadays, liberty and freedom are fundamental and paramount values that we cherish. While some people contend that personal freedom should remain inviolable from government interference. However, I firmly disagree with this viewpoint and I will illustrate with two compelling instances in the essay.

First and foremost, public welfare sometimes takes precedence over individual rights. In term of crisis, the government might have no choice but to infringe on one’s privacy or liberty. Take coronavirus as an example, severe pandemic has ravaged for the past three years, majority of individuals worldwide have tested positive for Covid-19. The authorities took measures to mitigate the impacts of the virus, including implementing mandatory mask-wearing regulations, enforcing limitations at national borders; however, contact tracing raised concerns as it intruded upon individuals’ privacy. Individuals testing positive had to undergo quarantine or isolation from others due to public hygiene factor. Moreover, spreading false or misleading information should be curtailed because it may have adverse impact on those who can not easily tell apart true or false.

In addition, social safety is important. Some individuals may not take law enforcements or other’s freedom seriously, which can be a potential menace for jeopardizing other’s life. Firstly, the information of violent or sexual assault criminals or murderers should be revealed to public after confirming the criminal facts by authorities. Also, they should be sentenced to life imprisonment for serious offenses. Second, those who have drunk-driving should be revoked their licenses, which can improve the road safety.

In conclusion, governments have the right to invade one’s freedom when in an emergency or to reduce the crime rates. For these reasons, it is possible that to achieve a healthier, safer and peaceful community.

entry.title: 活用你的表情符號吧！
entry.content:
前言

剛好朋友推薦試用 emoji ，而可以兩天免費試用新的表情符號，所以來嚐鮮看看

技巧

有別於一般的貼圖稍微有點不同， 生動的 emoji 甚至可以採組合技，表達你多元豐富的情緒
但是不過有一些限制，最多只能三個，一個和兩個的大小一致，三個圖案的時候會稍微縮小一點

單打獨鬥

可以選擇單一的表情符號，有時單一個也足夠呈現目前想要表達的心情

  • 呼搭啦：我現在就想要喝

好事成雙

  • 乾杯：適合想要揪喝酒時候

  • 打拳：覺得該朋友欠揍的時候

  • 大聲公：你是在大聲什麼啦！

三人成虎

  • 花開富貴：看到對方心花怒放

  • 歡迎光臨：很開心跟你聊天

上下一心

  • 生日快樂：還使用一般的貼圖嗎？趕快跟風來個不一樣的祝福

  • 指來指去：到底誰是兇手？

三合一

  • 金字塔：鯊魚疊疊樂

心得

表情符號也動起來了，看起來真的非常有趣！這些招式請盡量對你的好朋友使用吧!

entry.title: Make the Most of Your Emojis!
entry.content:
Intro

A friend recommended I try out the emoji feature, which offers a two-day free trial of new emojis, so I gave it a go.

Tips

Unlike regular stickers, these animated emojis are a bit different — you can even combine them to express a richer, more varied range of emotions. There are a few limitations though: you can use at most three at a time. One or two emojis stay the same size, but with three they shrink slightly.

Going Solo

You can pick a single emoji — sometimes one is enough to convey exactly how you feel.

  • Just gimme: I want a drink right now

Better in Pairs

  • Cheers: perfect for when you want to round up some drinking buddies

  • Throwing punches: for when a friend is asking for it

  • Megaphone: what are you shouting about?!

Three’s a Crowd

  • Blooming riches: when you see the other person beaming with joy

  • Welcome: so happy to chat with you

In Sync

  • Happy birthday: still using ordinary stickers? Hop on the trend with a different kind of blessing

  • Pointing fingers: who exactly is the culprit?

Three in One

  • Pyramid: stacking sharks

Takeaway

The emojis are animated now, and they look really fun! Go ahead and unleash these moves on your good friends!

entry.title: The graph below gives information about the percentage of the population in four Asian countries living in cities from 1970 to 2020, with prediction for 2030 and 2040.
entry.content:
The line chart depicts the urban residency percentages in four distinct countries: the Philippines, Malaysia, Thailand, and Indonesia, covering the time frame from 1970 to 2020, with projection rate of each country durning 2030 and 2040.

Overall, it is readily apparent that living in urban areas will increase in each nation, particularly Malaysia and the Philippines. By the end of the period, the percentage of the population in Malaysia will reach the highest rate at the end of the period, while Thailand will be the lowest one.

Looking at the graph more closely, an upward trend in the Malaysia’s line was observed between 1970 and 2020, with 30%(nearly a third) and 75%(around third-quarters), respectively. Also, the number of population will still rise steadily as its prediction. For Thailand, the initial rate was under a fifth in 1970, and it grew slowly to almost 30% in 2020. Although the prediction of Thailand’s population will experience/witness a considerable upward trend between 2030 to 2040, it will rank the fourth position at the end.

Indonesia’s population was the lowest number (about 15%) in 1970; however, it had a surge during 1970 and 2020, even surpassed/outnumbered the rate of Philippines in 2010. The prediction of population in Indonesia will peak at around 60%, which will take the second place in 2040.

entry.title: The most important aim of science should be to improve people’s lives.
entry.content:
To what extent do you agree or disagree with this statement?

Nowadays, there are various advanced technologies such as mobile phones and cars. Some people argue that the ultimate goal of science is to enhance the quality of our lives. I completely agree with this view point and I will provide two compelling instances in the essay.

To begin with, the motivation of science is to have more convenient and comfortable lifestyle. It is undeniable that plenty of inventions appeared since the Industrial Revolution. First, the eldest underground was constructed in the UK, which was aim for business trading and transportation, reducing a lot of time on commuting and cost of trading. Recently, cars or shuttle buses are more sophisticated than ever before because they are not only for transportation but also for entertainment. With advanced artificial intelligence, autopilot systems can predict and avoid car accidents to improve road safety. Second, a tiny gadget phone provides a lot of functionality, such as social media, emails and games.

In addition, latest modern technologies can help people extend their lifespan by providing more accurate diagnosis and improve public hygiene. Firstly, Apple has been devoted itself to personal health by researching complicated or state-of-the-art technology. Apple watch is designed to monitor one’s heartbeat and blood pressure, which is suitable for the elderly. Second, in order to reduce the menace from the coronavirus, scientists had a remarkable progress on vaccines, including AZ and BNT, which can reduce the risk of pandemics.

In conclusion, the primary goal of science is that the motivation of living a better lifestyle and live longer. It is predictable that more and more advanced technology will be invented to satisfy our needs for health and convenience.

entry.title: Nowadays university education is considered very important for people's future. However, there are a lot of successful people who didn't get higher education.
entry.content:
Do you think that higher education is necessary to succeed in life?

Justify your opinion with relevant examples.

Academic education is one of the most common ways to measure one’s ability or credit. Some people argue that higher education is not essential because a plenty of successful businessmen, politicians, and celebrities do not have university’s degree. However, I disagree with this viewpoint and I will demonstrate compelling examples in the essay.

Firstly, higher education diploma is just a basic ticket for well-paid jobs. In Taiwan, majority of students have at least bachelor’s degree, some of them even achieve master or PhD degree. Thus, opportunities with famous companies or competitive salaries are often distributed to those who have higher academic education if they do not have any working experience. Take Mark Zuckerberg as an example, He studied the Harvard University, which is one of the most prestigious academic institutions worldwide, although he did not complete the course at that time. Zuckerberg is a Meta cofounder, who successfully created a well-known platform, including Facebook, Threads and Instagram. Intelligent and exceptional individuals like him also attend university, not to mention ordinary people. Thus, general people should acquire higher education.

In addition, there are many paths to succeed; however, studying in the university is one of the common ways to be successful. It is undeniable that creating business may involve economic theories, which can be taught in the university. Some businessmen tend to acquire EMBA or MBA courses if they have some working experiences. These courses not only help them to enhance their expertise but also create more chances to know successful individuals in other areas. Being a celebrity sometimes need luck, fortune and good-looking; however, meeting the requirement of the university is much more controllable if someone prove his hard-working. For instance, Emma Watson also applied for Oxford University recently to sharpen her skills despite having a well-known movie, Harry Potter.

In conclusion, higher education is necessary to succeed in life since higher education is usually seen as a basic requirement when applying jobs. Also, studying in the university is easier for general people to succeed. Without academic evidence, it is difficult to succeed if you are not exception.

entry.title: The line graph shows the average number of weekly patients visiting four clinics of a hospital from 2010 to 2016.
entry.content:
The given line graph compares the mean figures of patients who visited four different clinics in one hospital each /per week during 2010 and 2016, including birth control, eye, diabetic and dental clinics.

Overall, it is evident that all of clinics had an upward trend at the end of the period. Eye clinic reached its highest number in 2016, whereas dental clinic had the lowest patients in 2012.

Looking at the graph more closely, eye clinic peaked at approximately 350 in 2016, which was the largest patients’ numbers in this line graph. During 2010 and 2012, eye clinic had a steady growth and reached 150 patients in 2012; however, it had a significant rise between 2012 to 2016. Birth control clinic ranked the first position in 2010 among all clinics, with 250 patients. Nevertheless, it experienced a downward tread during 2012 and 2014, with around 280 and 175 people, respectively.

Both numbers for dental and diabetic clinics had the similar figures during the period. Eye had its smallest number (around 50) in 2012, which was also the lowest figures in this line chart. Compared to eye clinic fluctuation, dental clinic rose steadily and peaked at around 175 patients in 2016.

entry.title: Today’s schools should teach their students how to survive financially in the world today.
entry.content:
To what extent do you agree or disagree with this statement?

In today’s rapidly ever-evolving world, school still offer tradition curriculum. It is undeniable that literature and mathematics are pivotal for our current education; however, students should be also informed correct financial knowledge. In this essay, I agree that schools should impart financial courses and I will provide two compelling reasons.

To begin with, an understanding of financial concepts is significantly important which can have enormous impacts on one’s life. Students should be taught various economical indexes to understand how the market works, such as stock indexes, interest rates or exchange rates. Inexperienced students are susceptible to exaggeration in advertisements or unreliable investment groups when they lack the knowledge to distinguish the truth from falsehood. Moreover, these concepts might lead them have stable cash flow or even early retirement, providing personal financial security and the freedom to pursue their dreams.

On top of that, credit scores are also imperative for those who are eager to purchase a house or car in the future. If students buy stock without enough money, their credit scores would be affected and could have adverse impacts on their interest rates. Investing in real estate often requires a considerable wealth; thus, it is common that individuals to have mortgages to make it affordable. However, banks offer less favorable interest rates, impose higher fees, and provide lower loan amounts to individuals with poor credit scores. Thus, academic institutions should plan a course teaching the correct concepts of debt management.

To conclude, nowadays many students lack correct financial knowledge, which makes them vulnerable to scams and frauds. Debt management is also a crucial issue because the majority of individuals might need to borrow money. With these two reasons, it is essential for schools to offer a well-planned curriculum in the field of finance for students.

entry.title: The plans below show the site of an airport now and how it will look after redevelopment next year.
entry.content:
Summarise the information by selecting and reporting the main features, and make comparisons where relevant.

The schemes depict the map of an airport current state and the refurbishment in the following year.

Overall, the redesign promises an expansion in both the number of gates and customer facilities. The blueprint also entails a relocation of stores to better cater to passengers’ needs, along with an increase in the number of entrance doors to accommodate a higher volume of individuals.

First, it is evident that there will 18 gates next year, nearly double the current count of 8 gates. A sky train will be implemented to reduce the distance between security passport control and the gates, as the airport will undergo significant expansion. The airport will offer an array of additional facilities, including shops, ATMs, baggage drop services, and car rental options. Upon passing through the security passport control, passengers will have the opportunity to explore new shops and amenities.

Furthermore, the check-in center will be relocated from left side to right side when entering the departure area, and the airport will transition from a single entrance to having two entrances for both departures and arrivals.

entry.title: Some people claim that immigrants should adopt the local culture when immigrating to a new country. While others think that they can establish a minority community instead.
entry.content:
Discuss both views and give your opinion.

More people prefer to immigrate to other country due to economic, political, or cultural aspects. While some people contend that they should build a minority community, others argue that embracing different culture is more recommended. This essay will discuss both viewpoints and argue in favor of the latter.

On the one hand, immigrants in an unfamiliar country somehow are affected mentally and physically. It is undeniable that a hidden language barrier is constructed when speaking a non-native language with native speakers sometimes. Native speakers may use idioms or local words that it is difficult for foreigners to understand immediately. For instance, elevator and lift have the same meaning; however, in the UK, it is more common to use lift instead of elevator. Moreover, when staying in a foreign nation, some individuals may not adept into local foods or cultures, which may lead to homesickness or depressing moods. Thus, it is common that there are numerous China towns worldwide, providing Asian cuisine and Chinese supermarkets can be observed.

On the other hand, experiencing different culture can enrich one’s life. If someone makes the right decision to immigrate to another country, it is possible that somebody is inclined to immerse himself or herself in diverse cultures and backgrounds. Studies have shown that those who are willing to accept the local culture in a new country tend to have more enjoyable and happier lives, which can encourage them to have more exceptional ideas and contribute to the workplaces. Furthermore, interacting with locals definitely broaden our horizons. For instance, having an exotic Christmas’s party in different country with local people is an unforgettable memory.

In my opinion, embracing local culture has brought plenty of benefits. These valuable memories will keep forever when tasting local foods or even exchange cultures with foreigners.

In conclusion, although living in an unfamiliar place sometimes leads to homesickness, immigrating to another nation is a very rare chance and it should be cherished. Thus, adopting the local culture is more recommended due to enriching one’s life.

entry.title: The table below shows the changes in exports in HK billions between 2009 and 2010.
entry.content:
The table illustrates the variation rate in Hong Kong exports during 2009 and 2010 in five different categories, including equipment, telecommunication, clothing, manufacturing, and metals.

Overall, it is evident that an upward trend could be observed in total changes. The change in the category of metals was the largest number, while the manufacturing one was the smallest.

Looking at the table more closely, it is clear that overall change increased during this period, from 32 billion in 2009 to 38.4 billion in 2010, representing a one-fifth increase. The change in metals had the highest percentage increase (122%) in this table; however, the change in manufacturing was the smallest number (-27%). Additionally, clothing exports also experienced a downward trend, with a -27% change, ranking the second position with negative growth.

Both of export numbers for equipment and telecommunication showed an upward trend, with changes of 13% and 61% (nearly two-thirds) respectively. Moreover, it is noticeable that the export number for telecommunication in 2010 reached the highest figure at 12.7 billion, and the figure for equipment was also over 10 billion, specifically 11.6 billion.

entry.title: Everyone deserves to be educated. It’s unfair that intelligent people are not admitted to private universities because of their financial background. University education should be free for everyone.
entry.content:
Do you agree or disagree?

Academic degree is one of the most common criteria measuring one’s ability or credit, so undoubtedly everyone has the right to pursue the higher educational degree. Some people argue that the government should provide all subsidy on one’s university fee. However, I do not support this viewpoint and I will provide two compelling reasons in the essay.

It is unfair to allocate the enormous expenditure on covering university fees for everyone by the government. The academic institutes should create a norm to evaluate each student’s academic performance and extracurricular activities. Instead of abolishing the tuition, the university should provide scholarships for those who perform academically well or has an extraordinary working experience. With this scholarship awarding system, students would be encouraged to strive for funds to complete their degrees. For instance, various universities in the UK provide plenty of funds for higher GPA applicants, which attract tens of thousands of students worldwide to study. Furthermore, numerous private and governmental institutes, including prestigious programs like the Chevening Scholarship, provide financial assistance to students facing economic hardships.

Without funds, the quality of education might decline. Tuition fees are allocated to various aspects, including research, academic journals, facilities, and professors, which are essential factors to achieve a higher position in QS rankings. Consequently, the university without enough funds might not be appealing for students due to its lower rank or quality. Administrative staff are crucial because they not only recruit new students but maintain the amenities, such as the library, swimming pool or playground. Moreover, these funds could reward those who are hard-working, stimulating students study PhD degrees or researching exceptional projects.

In conclusion, the funds should be allocated for scholarship rather than providing for all people. Investments in the quality of university deserve attention since it is undeniable that the evaluation QS rankings entails different aspects. Education is crucial; however, this does not equivalent that the higher academic degree should be entirely no charge for students.

entry.title: Supervisor 監控 Flask 服務
entry.content:
契機

自己建立的 flask 服務不知莫名的原因一直掛掉非常苦惱，當務之急是讓這個服務不要中斷，於是找到這個 supervisor 套件可以幫忙監控服務。而本篇文章特別紀念一下這位 Supervisor 大功臣。

簡介

Supervisor 是一個用 python 撰寫的程序管理套件，提供視覺化介面，方便可以啟用、重啟和關閉。該套件可以監控程序的狀態，若程序掛掉可以自動重啟，易於開發者監控服務。

安裝步驟

實作環境為 Ubuntu 20.04.2 LTS

待會有兩個檔案需要設定，分別為 Supervisor 設定檔和自己服務的設定檔

Supervisor 設定檔

將範例檔存到自己的路徑，而我是存放於 /etc/supervisor 的路徑之下

接著進入設定檔修改參數

修改最後兩行參數，修改 files 指向，待會要新增設定服務檔

我有特別將 unix_http_server、inet_http_server 、supervisorctl 的註解做改寫如下(因為一直遇到 ProtocolError: <ProtocolError for 127.0.0.1/RPC2: 401 Unauthorized> 的錯誤，主要是因為 authentication，有找這篇文章解決問題)

服務設定檔

新增自己要監控的服務設定檔，例如我創建一個 demo.conf

在這個 demo.conf 可以設定您的服務，這邊的 program 名稱等等會用到哦！

啟用監控服務

啟動 Supervisor
上面都設定完畢後就可以啟動 Supervisor 囉！

可以看一下是否有在 9001 port 啟動服務或是用 ps -ef 看一下

啟動服務監控

接者就啟動自己的服務

如果發現沒有啟動成功，可以看一下錯誤問題是什麼

筆者就發現該環境沒有安裝好 flask_script (應該要用 docker 來避免環境的問題)

裝好後大家就可以自己殺掉服務，看 supervisor 有沒有幫你重啟服務。

常用 Supervisor 指令

使用心得

只要幾個安裝步驟就可以方便監控服務，之後不需要服務掛掉要自己重啟，還有 web 面板可以操控，真是不錯！

entry.title: Monitoring a Flask Service with Supervisor
entry.content:
Motivation

My self-hosted Flask service kept crashing for no obvious reason, which was very frustrating. The top priority was to keep the service from going down, so I found the Supervisor package that can help monitor services. This post is a little tribute to Supervisor, the hero of the day.

Introduction

Supervisor is a process management tool written in Python. It provides a visual interface that makes it easy to start, restart, and stop processes. It can monitor the status of processes and automatically restart them if they crash, making it easy for developers to keep an eye on their services.

Installation Steps

The setup environment is Ubuntu 20.04.2 LTS

There are two files to configure: the Supervisor config file and your own service config file.

Supervisor Config File

Save the sample config to your own path. I stored it under /etc/supervisor

Then open the config file to modify the parameters

Modify the last two lines, pointing files to the directory where we’ll add the service config later

I specifically rewrote the comments for unix_http_server, inet_http_server, and supervisorctl as follows (because I kept running into the error ProtocolError: <ProtocolError for 127.0.0.1/RPC2: 401 Unauthorized>, which was mainly an authentication issue — I found this article that solved the problem)

Service Config File

Add the config file for the service you want to monitor. For example, I created a demo.conf

In this demo.conf you can configure your service. Note the program name here — we’ll use it later!

Enabling the Monitoring Service

Start Supervisor
Once everything above is configured, you can start Supervisor!

Check whether the service is running on port 9001, or use ps -ef to verify

Starting Service Monitoring

Next, start your own service

If it fails to start, you can check what the error is

I discovered that the environment didn’t have flask_script installed (I should have used Docker to avoid environment issues).

After installing it, you can kill the service yourself and see whether Supervisor restarts it for you.

Common Supervisor Commands

Final Thoughts

With just a few installation steps, you can conveniently monitor your services — no more manually restarting whenever the service goes down, plus there’s a web panel to control everything. Pretty nice!

entry.title: The pie charts below illustrate the number of journal articles read per week by all students, PhD students, and junior lectures at an Australian university.
entry.content:
The number of journal articles which are read each weekly by three different groups at an Australian university is portrayed in the given pie charts.

Overall, it is evident that the most proportion of each group are different. The number of articles read by PhD students is the highest, while the figure of articles read by all students is the smallest.

Looking at the pie chart more closely, it is undeniable that PhD students are the most hard-working students, since four-fifths of student read more than 12 articles; however, only 12% of all students, representing a minority, read over 12 articles. The number of reading 1-5 articles accounts the largest rate (67%, approximately two-thirds) in the category of all student, while the same number of articles in PhD students and junior student are 5% and 1%, respectively. Additionally, the number of 6 to 11 articles reaches the third-quarters rate, which represents the highest rate among all students (21%) and PhD students (15%).

entry.title: Establishing good relationships in the workplace is not important, as the primary goal of every person is to focus on work.
entry.content:
To what extent do you agree with this statement?

It is undeniable that companies are profitable oriented places, aiming for higher revenue or prestigious fame. Some people argue that the most critical goal for employees is to solely concentrate on work. However, I do not agree with this and I will provide two compelling reasons in this essay.

To begin with, projects could be completed more smoothly with better relationships. Some projects need the cooperation of individuals and huge funds. For instance, building a credit predicting system with artificial intelligent in bank requires various departments, such as credit card department, technological support team and so on. If they have good relationships, it is possible that the system could be established more rapidly and the company could benefit in short time. Moreover, huge projects often require team work and continue at least several months; thus, it is difficult to focus only on just work without building a relationship with other colleagues.

On top of that, better working vibe may enhance the productivity. Without the doubt, environment has a substantial impact on one’s mental and physical health. Studies have shown that working in a team with good relationships not only fosters employees’ efficiency, but also has a positive correlation with a company’s revenue. Take Google as an example, the cooperation offers their employees with facilities, such as gym, café and canteen, allowing them to have a flexible time communicating with others colleagues. Furthermore, team building culture is also a popular concept, which encourages the employees to interact with each other, creating more exceptional ideas or projects.

In conclusion, companies should not focus only on their profits because establishing good relationships have potential benefits, such as tasks can be done more smoothly or better working vibe helps the productivity. It is worthy that the companies should put more emphasis on the team relationship rather than just focusing on work.

entry.title: In many countries there is a shortage of suitable people for essential jobs. What do you think are the causes of this problem and what measures could be taken to solve it?
entry.content:
Nowadays, several nations have experienced a workforce shortage for necessary jobs, such as cleaner, farmer, and waiter. Without these kinds of labor, it might have an adverse impact on the development of the country. In this essay, I will illustrate the underlying reasons for staff shortages and offer some viable solutions on it.

The gap between essential occupations and professional careers often results from differences in educational levels. Those who have a higher academic background tend to be a knowledge worker rather than a manual or unskilled labor. Moreover, the proportion of individuals with bachelor’s or master’s degrees is higher than ever before, resulting in a large population of highly educated students. One possible approach is the raising the basic wage to attract more potential workers for necessary jobs. However, one drawback for increasing the budget is that it may lead to price hikes in daily commodities affecting personal expenses.

Another major contributing factor in staff shortage is excessive working hours. This not only makes lower quality of jobs but affects one’s mental and physical health. Policies should be implemented such as shifting systems to reduce it, although this would definitely require a larger workforce.

The third, and perhaps most important factor is low salary. Offering minimum wage may not be sufficient to attract the workforce in developed countries; thus, our authorities should consider employing more foreigner workers from other nations to address the shortage issue. This problem can be alleviated by hiring more foreigner workers, as the basic wage might be higher than in these developing countries.

In conclusion, shortage workforce for essential jobs is tricky and difficult problem relating to many aspects, such as education levels, excessive working hours and low salary. However, with correct and appropriate policies, it is possible to mitigate the impact of the issue.

entry.title: The bar chart below shows the popularity of well-known Instagram accounts in 2018 and 2021.
entry.content:
The bar chart details the follower statistics for five prestigious Instagram accounts in 2018 and 2021.

Overall, it is evident that all accounts have a considerable growth in their followers in this period. Cristiano Ronaldo reached the highest number of followers in 2021, whereas the Selena Gomez went from most to least popular over the period surveyed.

Looking at the graph more closely, Selena Gomez had by far the most followers, with 125 million, which was more than 10 million above Ariana Grande (112 million) and Ronaldo (110 million) in 2018. By 2021, Selena’s follower account had roughly doubled to 245 million while Ronaldo’s surged to lead all celebrities at 315 million and Ariana Grande increased more than twofold to 251 million. Kylie Jenner’s followers and The Rock were just around 95 million and 85 million in 2018, respectively; however, both influencers added approximately 150 million followers during three years.

All accounts experienced a huge growth in the followers’ number during three years, and Cristiano Ronaldo’s had the highest growth rate in this chart, which was around three times its initial figure. In 2018, the Rock had the smallest number (around 90 million people); however, the growth rate was also incredible, ranking in the second position on the bar chart, and the account followers reached approximately 250 million people in 2021.

entry.title: A lot of people have become dependent on technology as it plays a big role in our daily lives.
entry.content:
Do you agree that living in the computer age has more advantages than disadvantages? Describe the positive and negative impacts of technology on our lives and give your opinion.

Modern technology has played a crucial role in our daily lives, such as computers and mobile phones. These bring us convenience, creativity and economical effects, which is difficult to imagine living without these cutting age technologies. This essay examine the upsides and downsides of computer age.

In terms of advantages, learning can be easier than before. First, various genres of programs are provided on YouTube, where children can experience culture differences, gain abundant knowledge, and learn a second language. For instance, BBC offers meaningful and educational programs and Discovery Channel is a popular source for observing wild animals. Second, these programs are digital recorded, which can be replayed at any time or anywhere without limitation. Moreover, children no longer bring heavy printed books because this educational knowledge can be stored in lightweight iPads. Thus, it is possible that reducing the carbon dioxide by utilizing these tools.

However, improper using technology has adverse impacts on individuals or even society. Recent studies have implied that our younger generation is addicted to Instagram or TikTok, where they waste time because pursing just more likes or spotlights. It is undeniable that these kinds of platforms have distracted us, which make us spend less time on our families or friends. Furthermore, misinformation as well as fake news is full on the Internet and there are more and more cyber issues in recent years such as hacking, phishing and Internet fraud. Governments or authorities should take measures to tackle these problems or discuss with the specialists to mitigate the impacts. For instance, anyone who spread misinformation should be sent into jails. For personal aspect, setting a time restriction on apps would be an efficient way to manage the time.

In conclusion, there are several benefits on computers and mobile phones, such as learning educational programs, experiencing culture or wild animals. Nevertheless, technology has its drawbacks on misinformation, addiction or scam. If we utilize these tools well, in my opinion, I believe the pros can /will outweigh its drawbacks.

entry.title: In their advertising, business nowadays usually emphasize that their products are new in some way. Why is this?
entry.content:
Do you think it is a positive or negative development?

Compelling advertisements typically catch everyone’s attention. Not only can they attract potential consumers to purchase, but they can provide the organization with greater incentive to develop new merchandise. In my opinion, it is positive development for our advertisements.

People naturally tend to prefer novelty than the familiar. Advertisements strategically leverage this inclination to improve their visibility among potential consumers because it will boost the appeal and popularity of products. Mark Zuckerberg, the founder of Meta, has released the latest application of social media, Thread, which is a text-oriented application distinct from Instagram. It appealed more than 1 million people, who registered for the service within just an hour. The registration speed surpassed that of ChatGPT, astonishing countless individuals.

Another aspect is that the company’s commitment to developing more innovate products to meet diverse demands, fostering creativity and convenience for users. To illustrate, Apple unveiled the Dynamic Island feature on iPhone 14 Pro series models, elevating the interactive touch capabilities in this compact region compared to its previous state. Moreover, Apple collaborated with third-party platforms like Spotify and Youtube, users can experience heightened functionality when interacting with these apps through the Dynamic Island.

However, the company should not only consider new features on their products. They should take into consideration factors such as portability, durability and environmental concerns. For instance, the iPhone 15 series has adopted type-C charging cables, but I believe this compliance with EU regulations should have been implemented earlier.

In conclusion, consumers are susceptible to stimulus which will lead the company to provide novel products or new ideas. The phenomenon has the potential to drive our business towards greater creativity, discovery, and exploration.

entry.title: A lot of places in the world rely on tourism as a main source of income. Unfortunately, tourism can also be a source of problems if it is not managed correctly.
entry.content:
Describe the advantages and disadvantages of tourism in the modern world. Do you think that benefits of tourism outweigh its drawbacks?

Traveling has recovered and become more popular after three years of severe pandemic or coronavirus. Some people assert tourism can have adverse impact on the environment. However, I do not agree with this and I will illustrate several compelling reasons for supporting the benefits of tourism outweigh its drawbacks.

Tourism boosts the economy. In many countries, it is evident that tourism indeed brings tens of thousands of visitors annually and the governments make profits from it. Human resources are essential key factors for the tourism, such as the waiters in the restaurants, the cleaners in the hotels and the ground crew in the airports. With such substantial demands, local companies can offer more higher salary for their employees. Moreover, tourists from wealthy countries can purchase more products which can help local people earn extra money.

Furthermore, traveling abroad not only opens our horizon but gives us more concerns on historical sites. First, experiencing local culture or customs is an amazing and unforgettable memory when flying to another country. For example, drinking beers with fired chicken is a popular trend in Korea when hanging out with friends. Second, lots of historical tourist attractions are preserved well because of money flow from tourists.

However, it is undeniable that more and more tourists cause earth-shattering consequences. Some people throw away plastic waste or trash to the mountains. Recently, a lot of visitors came to Mountain Fuji and left bunch of junks, which had negative impacts on the environment. Simultaneously, excessive visitors make the area crowded and noisy and affect local transportation. Governments should take measures to address the issues and regulate laws to protect the environment. In my opinion, these difficulties can be overcome with appropriate policy or laws, so they are not huge problems.

In conclusion, tourism can boost a country’s economy with job opportunities, product-selling. It also provides several benefits like opening one’s horizon and putting more emphasis on historical sites. Nevertheless, authorities should take actions to prevent the environment from vicious tourists’ destruction. It can benefit people and reduce the effect of its drawbacks by appropriate measures and I believe that the pros outweigh the cons.

entry.title: The pie chart below show how much money is spent in the budget on different sectors by the UAE government in 2000.
entry.content:
The pie chart illustrates the proportion of expenditure on various departments by the UAE government in 2000.

Overall, it is clear that a huge amount of money was expended on social security in the surveyed year, whereas this figure for transportation was incredibly low.

Looking at the pie chart more closely, one can see that social security occupied the largest amount of expenditure (100 billion), while transport was the smallest figure (9 billion). The figure of health and personal social services was the second largest amount of spending in this pie chart, with 53 billion and its proportion was approximately twenty percent. The figure for education took up 38 billion, ranking third position in the pie chart, which was roughly 2 times higher than that for housing the heritage and environment, at 15 billion. The fractions for defense, debt interest and other expenditure were almost the same, which was 22 billion, 22 billion and 23 billion respectively. In addition, over 15 billion was expended on law and order in comparison with only 13 billion of that in terms of industry, agriculture and employment.

entry.title: The diagram show the recycling process of aluminum cans.
entry.content:
The diagram below illustrates the several stages of how to recycle aluminum cans.

Overall, it is evident that the process commences with disposing of the used cans and ends with manufacturing containers with reusing material.

Initially, used cans are thrown away into the trash bins then collected and sent to the special center which is particularly dealing with these containers for recycling. The aluminum cans are cleaned and sorted first, because they may be filthy and inappropriate for reusing. Subsequently, they are shredded and compressed by a sophisticated recycling machine. After completing the stage, the aluminum cans are heated and melted into the form of liquid, which is the raw material for reusing.

The liquid is rolled out to the thickness of between 2.5mm to 6.mm, and it is ready to apply the ingredients into producing the containers. The recycling products are used into various containers, such as drinks cans or foods jars, which are quite often seen in the supermarkets or convenience stores. In the UK, Coke Cola cans are made up of 74 percent recycled material.

entry.title: Some people say that the main environmental problem of our time is the loss of particular species of plants and animals. Other say that there are more import environmental problems.
entry.content:
Discuss both these views and give your own opinion.

Environmental concerns have undeniably risen to the forefront of global issues in recent times. While some individuals emphasize the significance of the loss of specific species as the primary environmental challenge, others contend that there exist more critical problems warranting our immediate attention. In this essay, I will delve into both perspectives and present my own viewpoint.

Animals and plants play pivotal roles in our ecosystem. Their absence would lead to a loss of biodiversity, severely impacting the environment. Most plants are essential for carbon dioxide to oxygen conversion, a critical process for numerous Earth inhabitants. Moreover, certain animal species may become extinct due to the rising of sea levels, resulting in the destruction of its biodiversity, and thus, the disruption of food chains. Some fish or plants may disappear from our dining table and some farmers or fishermen may lose their livelihoods.

On the other hand, these environmental problems have direct and significant consequences for humans, making them more urgent and critical than the loss of biodiversity. First, air pollution has severe impacts on the individuals’ health, resulting in the disease or even cancer in cities such as Beijing. Second, rising sea levels affect island nations, forcing residents to leave their homes. Last but not least, improper disposal of plastic waste and trash not only fosters the proliferation of insects but makes our cities filthy or unsanitary.

In conclusion, though the loss of specific species is a significant environmental concern, issues such as air pollution, rising sea-level, and improper waste disposal have more immediate and direct impacts on humanity. It is vital that we prioritize environmental protection to safeguard not only biodiversity but our own well-being.

entry.title: 關於我參加軟體工程師的專題班的那些事
entry.content:
前言

這故事要提到我的職涯計畫，以前是在金融業做 Data Scientist 和 RPA (Robotic Process Automation)，那時候也有開發一些全端的網站應用。而當我接觸網站開發的那一刻起，我心中就對這塊充滿好奇心。

當時，我提出以儀表板方式呈現各部門使用 RPA 的情況，並簡單地進行了一個概念驗證（POC）。當主管看到這個儀表板時，對此印象深刻，甚至還請旁邊的其他同事來評估我所開發的網站。那時候，我內心充滿了成就感，也因此對轉向網站開發產生了興趣。

我平常使用的語言是 Python，開發的框架大多是 Flask、FastAPI 並搭配 Postgres。為了加深自己對於網站開發的技能，也對於現行軟體課程評估了一番，最後決定參加六角學院的軟體工程師企業專題班。

關於課程

課程主要使用 Node.js 搭配 Mongo DB 開發，這兩個也是我沒有接觸過的技術，下定決心要好好新技術，提升自己的職涯競爭力。

這個課程主要是完成專題為導向，大致上可以列出四點：

  • 約三個月完成網站開發專案
  • 從零開始規劃網站線稿圖
  • 短時間內學習新技術
  • 與其他工程師遠端協作

我想額外提到，每週五會有線上直播課程，每週一與專題教練對齊開發進度。由於課程的技術也會應用到專題上，因此也會更有動力在每週五晚上去聽老師的課程。而週末就會進行衝刺開發，也是為了在禮拜一可以跟教練同步我們做的進度。

專案簡介

我們的專案名稱是「超人幫手」，座右銘是「讓您在生活中擁有超人的力量」。我們希望提供一個平台，讓使用者可以輕鬆地找到需要幫助的任務。同時，我們也希望讓使用者感受到自己像超人一樣有能力去幫助別人解決問題，實現自我價值的提升。

Live Demo ：https://superhandy-frontend.zeabur.app/

GitHub Backend：https://github.com/erik1110/SuperHandy-backend

GitHub Frontend：https://github.com/erik1110/SuperHandy-frontend

綜上所述，這是一個任務媒合系統，提供需求者「案主」與提供者「幫手」進行媒合。而我們開發的時候有四大功能：

    1. 地圖搜尋任務
    1. 技能評價
    1. 聊天室
    1. 會員點數加值

關於小組

我們組有五位工程師，後端包含我有兩位，前端有三位，我覺得我們組的開發效率、遠端協作與雙向溝通都很不錯。

平時我們在禮拜三、日的晚上會有小組大會議，這是大家一起參與，而這時候聚焦在整個專案的里程碑。例如前期一起規劃網站的架構、中期討論網站的大功能、後期討論前後端 API 介接的開發進度等等。

而後端會議通常會在日下午，有點算是晚上的會前會，我們會彼此討論後端的進度或是需要協助的部份。因此我自己盡量將份內的進度壓在日下午以前完成。

開會方式透過 Discord 的語音聊天，如下圖

(後端搞小圈圈還開一個後端小屋 🤣)

選擇技術

每個人時間都有限，大家平常也都需要上班，因此我們列出這次專題可能會用到的技術列表，每個人都會對想學的技術進行評分點數(一個點數為 4 個小時)，最後加總的點數大約落在 15 上下，代表這段時間可以學習的技術點數。(很像小時候玩線上遊戲，一開始的技術點數不太足夠，我們只能投資最想要的部分)

如下圖，這次我以學習 Node.js 、規劃資料庫環境為主，其他次要的包含第三方登入、金流串接和部署雲端。

經濟學課本的第一句話：「資源有限，慾望無窮」，想要在短時間內完成多個技術學習難上加難，還可能會鼯鼠五技，不如在一開始先圈列好最想要的技能，並且透過量化方式來評估自己的時間可以事半功倍。

規劃 API

終於來到規劃 API 的階段，透過線稿圖去構思可能會有哪些功能。這時候列出表格相當重要，首先教練希望就登入、使用者帳號先做好，因此在列出的同時，也可以同步開發。

基本上欄位至少需要包含角色、頁面群組、 API 名稱、API 路徑、方法，其他欄位是依照我們專案需求，例如進度、優先度等等。

在規劃 API 的同時，我們也同步列出 Mongo DB 的 collection

開發階段

前面紙上談兵告一段落，接下來進入實戰階段啦😆 我們大概從五月中旬陸續開發，後端可以先從建立 MongoDB 和 Swagger Docs 開始，熟悉 Node.js 的寫法著手。這邊要提到的是如果平常每週的直播課有跟著，並且寫回家作業的話，ㄧ開始使用 Express 建立 Node.js 會很快上手。

而後端的任務，就是將 API 列表中逐一實現到 Swagger Doc

後端開發功能大概的依序是：

  • 登入註冊寄信
  • 使用者資訊
  • 首頁
  • 刊登任務
  • 找任務
  • 系統通知
  • 聊天室
  • 金流串接
  • 第三方登入

這個階段教練檢核標準基本上是要看兩個角色是否可以進行互動，以我們專案需求來說，我們設計的任務系統包含「幫手」接任務、「案主」接任務。因此大致上我們完成到第五點就是本專案最主要的功能，後續 6～9 點是加分功能。由於開發時間有限，主要功能如果沒有先開發好，就算有加分功能也是白搭。

而我認為這次專案最難的地方也就是刊登任務，我們的需求是要做需求單據的系統，其中單據會有相當多種的狀態，並且還會有草稿區、下架模式。

補充說明，其實在前一個階段，我們也將這個考慮並著手規劃以下表格。而這張表也是要跟全組一起共同討論，因為這也關係到前端要怎麼呈現畫面。由於我們先定義好每個 status 的意義，在寫刊登任務相關功能就可以按照這張表進行開發。

協作工具

下圖是我們有利用到的協作工具，而專案簡報是使用 Canvas。

心得分享

經過這次的專案開發，除了認識一群工程師們好朋友，我們也完成很棒的 side project，讓我有滿滿的收穫和成就感。由於在每次與教練進度會議的時候，提前加入會議亦可以看到其他組的進度。有些其他組的組員可能剛好公司專案進行就會比較沒有時間開發、常常加班或是特殊情況，導致進度上較為落後。因此我真的很感謝組員們各各很罩，大家的進度都非常神速，也會互相 cover 和講幹話。

另外我想提到的是，平常上班都這麼辛苦了，為什麼大家下班還要進修並增進技術呢？我認為有兩點：

    1. 時間規劃：有多少人會記得在每年年初自己訂下的目標，而年底的時候能真的完成與實踐呢？我覺得能做到這點的人不多。因此，參加一門規劃好的課程，依照進度按表操課，並且有一群夥伴互相提醒切磋，我認為是相當不錯的方式。
    1. 提升自我：大家無非是想要提升技術，更重要的是提升職場競爭力，未來在面試時可以拿出 side project。透過實際去開發作品來應用技術，這些技能才會是自己的看家本領和真功夫。

感謝看到這篇文章的你，若不嫌棄可以鼓鼓掌給作者加油打氣，謝謝 😆

entry.title: My Experience in a Software Engineer Capstone Program
entry.content:
Preface

This story starts with my career plan. I used to work as a Data Scientist and in RPA (Robotic Process Automation) in the financial industry, where I also built some full-stack web applications. From the moment I got into web development, I was full of curiosity about this field.

At the time, I proposed presenting how each department used RPA in the form of a dashboard, and put together a simple proof of concept (POC). When my manager saw the dashboard, they were impressed and even invited other colleagues to evaluate the website I had built. In that moment I felt a deep sense of accomplishment, which sparked my interest in moving toward web development.

The language I usually work in is Python, and the frameworks I develop with are mostly Flask and FastAPI paired with Postgres. To deepen my web development skills, I evaluated a number of current software courses, and eventually decided to join the Software Engineer Enterprise Capstone Program at Hexschool.

About the Course

The course mainly uses Node.js with MongoDB — two technologies I had never worked with before. I was determined to learn these new technologies well and boost my career competitiveness.

This course is primarily project-driven, and it can be roughly summarized in four points:

  • Complete a web development project in about three months
  • Plan website wireframes from scratch
  • Learn new technologies in a short time
  • Collaborate remotely with other engineers

I’d also like to add that there was a live online lecture every Friday, and we aligned development progress with our capstone coach every Monday. Since the technologies taught in the course were also applied to the project, there was even more motivation to attend the lectures on Friday nights. Weekends were for sprint development, so that we could sync our progress with the coach on Monday.

Project Introduction

Our project was called “Superhandy,” with the motto “Give yourself superhuman power in everyday life.” We wanted to provide a platform where users could easily find tasks they need help with. At the same time, we wanted users to feel capable, like a superhero, of helping others solve problems and realizing their own self-worth.

Live Demo: https://superhandy-frontend.zeabur.app/

GitHub Backend: https://github.com/erik1110/SuperHandy-backend

GitHub Frontend: https://github.com/erik1110/SuperHandy-frontend

In summary, it’s a task-matching system that connects “clients” who need help with “helpers” who provide it. We built four core features:

    1. Map-based task search
    1. Skill ratings
    1. Chat room
    1. Member points top-up

About the Team

Our team had five engineers — two on the backend including me, and three on the frontend. I thought our team’s development efficiency, remote collaboration, and two-way communication were all excellent.

We usually held a full-team meeting on Wednesday and Sunday nights, where everyone participated and focused on the milestones of the whole project. For example, planning the website architecture together in the early stage, discussing the major features in the middle stage, and tracking the development progress of frontend-backend API integration in the later stage.

Backend meetings were usually on Sunday afternoons — sort of a pre-meeting before the evening session — where we discussed backend progress and where we needed help. So I tried to wrap up my own tasks before Sunday afternoon.

We met via Discord voice chat, as shown below.

(The backend folks formed their own little clique and even opened a separate backend room 🤣)

Choosing Technologies

Everyone’s time was limited, and we all had day jobs, so we listed out the technologies we might use for this project. Each person assigned point values to the technologies they wanted to learn (one point equals 4 hours), and the total came out to around 15 — representing the technology points we could learn in that time. (It’s a lot like playing online games as a kid: at the start your skill points aren’t quite enough, so you can only invest in what you want most.)

As shown below, this time I focused mainly on learning Node.js and planning the database environment, with secondary priorities including third-party login, payment integration, and cloud deployment.

The first sentence of the economics textbook: “Resources are limited, desires are infinite.” Learning multiple technologies in a short time is extremely difficult, and you might end up a jack of all trades, master of none. It’s better to circle the skills you want most from the start, and use a quantified approach to make the best use of your time.

Planning the API

Finally we reached the API planning stage, brainstorming what features might be needed based on the wireframes. Listing things out in a table was crucial here. The coach wanted us to finish login and user accounts first, so we could develop them while listing them out.

At a minimum, the fields needed to include role, page group, API name, API path, and method. Other fields depended on our project’s needs, such as progress, priority, and so on.

While planning the API, we also listed out the MongoDB collections in parallel.

Development Phase

After all the theory, it was time for the real battle 😆 We started development around mid-May. On the backend, we could begin by setting up MongoDB and Swagger Docs and getting familiar with Node.js syntax. One thing to mention: if you kept up with the weekly live lectures and did the homework, getting started with Express and Node.js would be very quick.

The backend’s job was to implement each API from the list into the Swagger Doc one by one.

The rough order of backend feature development was:

  • Login, registration, and email
  • User information
  • Home page
  • Posting tasks
  • Finding tasks
  • System notifications
  • Chat room
  • Payment integration
  • Third-party login

The coach’s review standard at this stage was basically whether two roles could interact. For our project’s needs, the task system we designed included “helpers” accepting tasks and “clients” posting tasks. So roughly speaking, completing up to point five was the main functionality of this project, while points 6–9 were bonus features. Since development time was limited, if the main features weren’t built first, the bonus features would be useless.

I think the hardest part of this project was posting tasks. Our requirement was to build a task-order system, where orders could have many different statuses, plus a draft area and an unlisted mode.

As a side note, in the previous stage we also considered this and started planning the table below. This table also had to be discussed with the whole team, because it affected how the frontend would render the screen. Since we defined the meaning of each status first, we could develop the task-posting features according to this table.

Collaboration Tools

Below are the collaboration tools we used, and the project slides were made with Canva.

Reflections

After this project, besides making a group of engineer friends, we also completed a great side project, which gave me a real sense of accomplishment and reward. Since I joined the progress meetings with the coach early each time, I could also see other teams’ progress. Some members of other teams might have been busy with company projects, frequently working overtime, or in special situations, causing their progress to fall behind. So I’m really grateful that my teammates were all so capable — everyone’s progress was incredibly fast, and we covered for each other and joked around.

Another thing I want to mention: work is already exhausting, so why do people still study and improve their skills after hours? I think there are two reasons:

    1. Time planning: How many people remember the goals they set at the beginning of each year and actually accomplish them by year’s end? I think not many can do this. So joining a well-structured course, following the schedule, and having a group of partners reminding and learning alongside each other is, in my view, a pretty good approach.
    1. Self-improvement: Everyone wants to improve their skills, but more importantly, to boost their workplace competitiveness so they can show a side project in future interviews. By actually building something and applying the technologies, these skills become your own real expertise and true ability.

Thank you for reading this far. If you don’t mind, feel free to give the author a round of applause for encouragement. Thanks 😆

entry.title: Nowadays, a growing number of people with health problems are trying alternative medicines and treatments instead of visiting their usual doctor.
entry.content:
Do you think this is a positive or a negative development?

It is undeniable that as individuals age, their bodies become more susceptible to illness, disease, or even cancer. Access to quality healthcare is a crucial concern worldwide, especially given the prevalence of sedentary lifestyles and poor dietary habits. Some people are drawn to alternative treatments; however, there are potential drawbacks to this approach that deserve consideration. In this essay, I will illustrate the underlying reasons on it.

Doctor undergo rigorous training and possess extensive professional knowledge in the field of medicine. In my hometown country, Taiwan, medical professionals spend a minimum of six to seven years studying before they are granted certification. Many doctors continue to pursue further education and training even after completing their formal studies, which underscores their dedication to staying up-to-date with the latest medical advancements. This level of expertise and commitment is crucial in ensuring that patients receive accurate diagnoses and appropriate treatment. Moreover, when patients consult doctors, they contribute to a body of knowledge that can be shared with others facing similar health issues.

One of the significant disadvantages of relying solely on alternative treatments is the potential for adverse side effects. Without the guidance of medical professionals or the support of empirical evidence from academic research, individuals may unknowingly expose themselves to unnecessary risks. Some alternative medicines and treatments may not be regulated by government health agencies, resulting in fluctuating prices and the risk of expired or counterfeit products. Widespread adoption of these alternatives could undermine the integrity of our healthcare system and jeopardize individual well-being, ultimately forcing people back to conventional medical care.

In conclusion, while alternative medicines and treatment may have their merits in certain cases, they should not be regarded as a wholesale replacement for conventional medical care. Doctor’s extensive training equip them to make informed decisions about patient’s health, ensuring that they receive the most appropriate treatment. Thus, it is advisable to seek professional medical guidance when addressing health issues.

entry.title: Many manufactured food and drink products contain high levels of sugar, which causes many health problems. Sugary products should be made more expansive to encourage people to consume less sugar. Do you agree or disagree?
entry.content:
In recent times, people have been consuming more food than ever before, leading to potential health issues such as cancer or disease. Some individuals argue that increasing the prices of sugary products could discourage customers from excessive sugar consumption. However, I do not support this viewpoint and I will illustrate two underlying reasons in this essay.

Sugar manufactures primarily prioritize profit over health concerns. Placing the burden solely on these companies is not fair, as poor health can result from a variety of factors, including genetics, personal behaviors, habits, and environmental influences. It is acknowledged that the excessive sugar intake can contribute some illness like obesity, but raising the price of products will not deter consumers who have a strong preference for sugary drinks and sweets. Moreover, such a price increase could lead to economic and financial challenges for society. Instead, the government should consider implementing polices that mandate clear and informative labeling of nutritional content, enhancing transparency for consumers.

Another significant contributing factor is a lack of physical activity, which can lead to obesity or even cancer. This sedentary lifestyle becomes more prevalent as people age, contributing to various health problems. To address this, authorities should promote slogans like “three times a week at least 30 minutes” or offer health education programs to raise awareness among citizens. Engaging in regular physical activity not only decreases health problems but extends one’s lifespan. For individuals who claim they lack time for structured sports courses due to busy work schedules, research has shown that simple changes, such as walking ten thousand steps daily or opting for stairs over elevators, can serve as effective exercise.

In conclusion, raising the prices of sugary products may not be the most effective solution to combat health problems and could lead to unintended economic consequences. Instead, the government should focus on promoting physical activity through slogans or lessons. It is possible that sports can decrease the rate of health issues and span one’s lifespan.

entry.title: The diagram illustrates how bees produce honey.
entry.content:
The given diagram shows the most important process of making honey which commences with making the hive and ends in storing the honey in the jars.

Initially, a bunch of bees has to build a container called a hive with a hexagonal shape. After building their repository of honey, they seek for nectar. Meanwhile, the blossoming plants release its fragrance which attracts bees. When bees find a suitable flower, they collect the nectar from it, which is used as the raw material to produce honey.

The nectar is taken back to the hive and then stored in its cells. This process may be taken time because there are a lot of cells in a hive. Subsequently, the bees flap their wings in order to generate the air to cool it down. As a result, the nectar loses it water content and then finally, the honey is produced. Ultimately, the collected honey is stored and packed in jars to be delivered to the markets.

entry.title: Some people think that government should strictly control the supply of fresh water, as it is a limited resource, while others it should not be regulated.
entry.content:
For human beings, water is an indispensable and essential resource in the worldwide and its quality would have enormous impact on our health. While some individuals argue that it should not be governed by authorities, I believe there are more compelling reasons for the government to regulate water resources to ensure stability and high quality.

To begin with, one of the primary reasons for advocating government regulation of water is to prevent negative consequences. For instance, irresponsible factories may neglect environmental protection measures, leading to water pollution and irreversible damage to the environment. Without proper management, we might end up consuming contaminated water, which could result in health issues such as diarrhea. Furthermore, continuous monitoring of water quality and maintenance of water tanks require substantial financial investment and human resources.

Instead of relaying solely on self-regulation, the government should enact strict laws to control the supply of water. To illustrate, imposing severe penalties, such as life imprisonment, on those who pollute water sources would deter potential offenders. Governments should allocate funds for the development of advanced monitoring systems that track water quality, acidity, and remaining volume on a daily basis. These data should be made publicly accessible through a website to ensure transparency and allow people to make informed decisions about their water consumption.

In conclusion, the lack of regulations could lead to the consumption of unsafe water. It is essential for the government to take proactive measures to regulate the supply of fresh water to safeguard public health and the environment.

entry.title: Television cannot replace the book as a learning tool, which is why children are less well educated today. Do you agree or disagree?
entry.content:
The Internet and television have become major tools for children to acquire new knowledge or materials. Some individuals argue that these tools have an adverse impact on children because they might replace the book. However, the benefits of television outweigh its drawbacks.

Television offers various educational contents. Since the advent of the Internet, programs can be access with different sources, such as Discovery and BBC. Children have the opportunity to learn about creatures in various environments, from scorching hot deserts to the extremely cold Arctic Circle via television programs. The educational programs offer the most authentic English from native speakers at BBC Learning English. These meaningful videos, they not only stimulate our learning motivation but they broaden our horizons without traveling abroad.

In addition, television programs can be digitally preserved regardless of weather or environmental conditions and stored permanently once it is uploaded to Google Drive or Dropbox. When we have enormous videos and materials on the Internet, tackling the challenge of effective search become crucial. Thanks to advanced algorithms, data retrieval has becomes nearly instantaneous, which makes it possible to spread the knowledge with efficiency. To illustrate, Youtube, as one of the primary platforms, hosts immense videos or movies, and basic keywords are usually sufficient to cater individual needs.

Proponents of traditional books often argue that they are irreplaceable due to the printed format. However, it is widely acknowledged that paper manufacturing, which involves the felling of numerous trees, contributes to the acceleration of global warming. Conversely, physical books have their drawbacks as they lack durability and are susceptible to moisture and dirt.

In conclusion, television can replace the books due to their educational contents, durability. It is possible that the digital of transmission of knowledge could replace the traditional methods in near future with its substantial advantages.
